---

## Problem

What limitation or opportunity does this request address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the improvement.

## Why It Matters

- Retrieval quality
- Latency or throughput
- Observability
- Deployment maturity
- Portfolio value

## Validation Plan

How should this be tested or measured?
